titleStmt.title: SII 15.211: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 211. (B.K. No. 58 of 1927-28.) MR1VUṆḌI, MUNDARGI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of Veṅkaṭēśvara temple.
This is dated the 5th regnal year of the king and Naḷa, the other details being lost. This may be equated to 1196 A.D.

After describing the Five Hundred Svāmis of Ayyāvaḷe, it registers certain social regulations formulated by them and the Mahājanas. It then records a gift of income from levies to the god Billēśvara of Dēhutagēri by Billa Three-hundred headed by Hallakētabōva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of No. 210 above.
div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanavikhyāta paṁcaśatavīrasāsanala
bdhānēkaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛta satyaśaucacārucāritra nayavina
yavijñāna vīrabaṇaṁjudharmmapratipāḷana viśudva guḍḍaddhaja virājitānū
nasāhasasatyabaḷavīralakṣmi liṁgitavakṣasthaḷa bhuvanaparākramōṁnataruṁ
vāsudēvakhaṁḍaḷīmūḷabhadravaṁśōdbhavaruṁ bhagavatīdēvīlabdhavaraprasā
daruṁ [Ē]kaikavīraruṁ kalahaṁsapūrṇnaruṁ Ekkōṭiya guḍḍadayinūrbbaruṁ
napradhānaruṁ Ekōṭiya dvātriṁśavēḷā ṟaruṁ Aṣṭādaśapaṭṭa
ṇakkellaṁ phaṇiya phaṇāmaṇiyappaṁtirddayyāvaḷeyayinūrvvasvāmi
gaḷa pūrbbāvatārameṁteṁdaḍe baladalu yaṁnaruṁ caladalu duryyō
dhananaṁnaruṁ tyāgadalu karṇnanaṁnaruṁ satyadalu dharmmaputranaṁnaruṁ sāhasadalu bhī
manaṁnaruṁ parākramadalu phalguṇanaṁnaruṁ Aṟitadalu sahadēvanaṁnaruṁ sauryya
dalu gāṁgēyanaṁnaruṁ tējadoḷādityanaṁnaruṁ bhōgadalu dēvēṁdranaṁnaruṁ kōpado
ḷagniyaṁnaruṁ gāṁbhīradalu mahāsamudranaṁnaruṁ yittu daṇiyedudaṟiṁ kalphavri
kṣanaṁnaruṁ rūpinalu kāmadēvanaṁnaruṁ kādi sōladudaṟiṁ dhaṁnvaṁtarāmanaṁnaruṁ nera
daḍe naṁjuharidaḍe maṁjuva pādasēkhararuṁ saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararuṁ paranālī sahō
dararuṁ bhayalōbhavarjjitaruṁ nuḍidu matteṁnadaruṁ maṟeyuge kāvaruṁ kesaṟa kicci ḍuvaruṁ
maṇalasaraviya hosavaruṁ huliya mīsayanuyyalāḍuvaruṁ kāḷōragana vi
ḍidu maṁḍāḍuvaruṁ naṁjanaṁjalisuvaruṁ Ānaya bhēriyē maddaḷeyāgeyuṁ Ākāśave beḷgo
ḍeyāgeyuṁ suracakravarttiyarusāge Agniyē kaḷanāgeyuṁ diravevē mēḷe yavā
geyuṁ caṁdrana caṁdrabalamāge Ādityane beṁbalavāge tārakegaḷe kaidīvigeyāge nakṣatra
me hūmāleyāge javane surige�ḍavanāge dēvane gaḷeviḍivanāge varuṇane
karagavaḍivanāge dhanadane bhaṁḍāriyāge ḷarā naṁdikēsarane vādya
vāḷanāge javana dibyāyudhaṁgaḷa dēvādigaḷu nō
ṭakarāge śaṁkhakahaḷe jēpaṁṭe jaga muṁ tējameṁba timira
nēṟisikoṁḍu nyāyameṁba vīramaddaḷe yaṁ toṭṭu meṁba
halageyaṁ hiḍidu nāṇeṁba ḷaṁ krō
dhaveṁba śatruva viṟidu kādi geldu sa kāryya ru
mappa svasti śrīmatu yādava baḷlāḷadēvavarṣada
5 neya naḷa saṁvatsarada mā śrīmadanādaya
grahāraṁ taṁkaṇayyāvaḷaya mukha Aśēṣa mahājanaṁga
ḷaynūrvvaruṁ mahānāḍugaḷuṁ dēhutagēriya billē
rgge sāsanamaṁ koṭṭa kramaveṁtaṁdoḍa masētuparyyaṁ
raṁ yiṟidaḍe daṁḍavilla hēṟi caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salisu
koṭṭa sāsanakrama . yī sāsanama vorbbanaḷidavanu vāraṇāsiya
lu kavileyaṁ brāhmaṇaraṁ koṁda mahāpātakanaku . samastanāḍiṁgaṁ drōha
nu . mattaṁ vūriṁgikkuva teṟe kaṭṭu guttage sarbbābādhaparihāravāgi bāgiliṁge
yippaṇavaṁ teṟuvaru Anyāyavasaḍḍāḷa yēnuṁ baṁdaḍaṁ paṁcamaṭhasthā
na dēvaputrakaru nakhara mahājana muṁmuṟidaṁḍaṁgaḷu kāydu naḍa
suvaru . svasti samastavastuvistīrṇna ghūrṇnitārnnava jagatītaḷavikhyāta bhuvanaparā
kramōnnataruṁ kāḍānemallaruṁ Aḍavikaṁdarpparuṁ dōṁṭiviḷāsaruṁ
maṟevuge kāvaruṁ caladaṁkarāmaruṁ sāhasasauryyaruṁ raṇaraṁgabhīma
ruṁ nuḍidante gaṁḍaruṁ kadana pracaṁḍaruṁ Ēkāṁgavīraruṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararuṁ
billēśvaradēvara pādārādhakarumappa hallakētabōva mukhyavāgi billamūnū
rbbaru dēvargge Aṁgabhōgakke vokkalalu hāgavoṁdu maduveyādaḍe koṁḍalli hā
ga . koṭṭalli hāga 2 Āḍu Āvu Eṁme Ēnu māridaḍaṁ hoṁge hā
ga . moḷavina kallige vīsavoṁdu Uppina heḍagege voṁmana vuppu ṟubaru hē
ṟiḍaḍe billēśvaradēvargge haṇa 1 hallakētabōvaṁge mattaru 5
Digital edition of SII 15.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
